prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年华东理工大学在上海综合类最低录取位次分别为约7531名、7800名、8712名、9417名、11041名，呈持续后移趋势，近5年累计后移约3510名，年均后 移约877名；2025年基准位次约11041名，较2024年大幅后移1624名，后移幅度明显加大；该校在上海综合类招生计划2021年475人、2022年492人、2023年520人 、2024年528人、2025年574人，持续扩招；2026年计划565人，较2025年减少9人，小幅缩招约1.57%，缩招对竞争略有缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 华东理工 大学是211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名近年稳中有升：2021年第45名→2022年第45名→2023年第44名→2024年第44名→2025年第44名→2026年第42名，排名持续向好，反 映学校综合实力稳步提升；2022年曾出现食堂相关偏负面舆情事件，但2023–2026年声誉文件中未再出现该校负面记录，近年声誉平稳；抖音热度排名第34位（ 总榜），评价为"较热"，综合热度约132万，短视频平台关注度处于中等偏上水平，对报考热度有一定正面作用；无投档断档或录取异常记录；第五轮学科评估 中，化学工程与技术获评A+（全国顶尖），化学获评A-，控制科学与工程获评A-；化学工程与工艺、工科试验班（智慧化工）等专业对应A+学科，化学类、化学（拔尖基地班）对 应A-学科，电子信息类（含自动化）对应控制科学与工程A-学科，优势学科对相关专业报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自 动化等专业社会热度持续高热推荐；数学/统计、能源动力等专业为推荐；金融/财经/经济、法学呈分化观望态势；生化环材类仍偏劝退但较往年有所改善；上海2026年高考总人 数约66700人（2025年为49276人），增幅约35%，考生规模大幅增长将显著加剧各校录取竞争；华东理工大学位于上海市 ，属于本地高校，在上海招生规模较大（500人以上），本地考生对本校认可度较高；university_home_province为上海，本地招生占比高，地域偏好有利于维持报考热度。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势（近5年后移3510名）、2026年上海考生规模大幅增长约35%（从49276增至约66700人）导致竞争显著加剧、招生计划小幅缩招1.57%略有 缓解作用、学校软科排名稳步上升（第42名）及抖音热度较热等正面因素，考虑考生规模激增是主导因素，预测2026年最低录取位次约11137名 ，较2025年小幅后移约96名；区间10637–11637名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约11137名，区间10637–11637名。位次在区间上限（11637名）以外建议以三档专业保底为主；位次在区间内（10637–11637名）建议以二档专业为主、三档保底、一档 冲刺；位次明显优于区间下限（10637名以内）可重点冲刺一档王牌专业（计算机类、电子信息类、化工双学位等）。华东理工大学化学工程与技术A+为全国顶尖，相关工科试验 班（智慧化工）虽社会热度偏分化但学科实力极强，适合对化工有明确兴趣的高分段考生。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for East China University of Science and Technology in Shanghai's comprehensive category were approximately 7531, 7800, 8712, 9417, and 11041, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 3510 positions over the past 5 years, averaging about 877 positions per year; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 11041, a significant backward shift of 1624 positions compared to 2024, with a notably increased magnitude; the university's enrollment plan in Shanghai's comprehensive category was 475 in 2021, 492 in 2022, 520 in 2023, 528 in 2024, and 574 in 2025, with continuous expansion; the 2026 plan is 565, a decrease of 9 from 2025, a slight reduction of about 1.57%, which slightly alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: East China University of Science and Technology is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. Its Soft Science Chinese University Rankings have been steadily rising in recent years: 45th in 2021 → 45th in 2022 → 44th in 2023 → 44th in 2024 → 44th in 2025 → 42nd in 2026, with a continuous positive trend, reflecting the steady improvement of the university's comprehensive strength; a negative public opinion incident related to the cafeteria occurred in 2022, but no negative records of the university appeared in reputation documents from 2023 to 2026, with stable reputation in recent years; Douyin popularity ranking is 34th (overall list), rated as "relatively hot", with a comprehensive popularity of about 1.32 million, indicating moderate to above-average attention on short video platforms, which has a certain positive effect on application enthusiasm; no record of admission interruptions or anomalies; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Chemical Engineering and Technology was rated A+ (top in the country), Chemistry was rated A-, and Control Science and Engineering was rated A-; majors such as Chemical Engineering and Technology and Engineering Experimental Class (Smart Chemical Engineering) correspond to A+ disciplines, Chemistry and Chemistry (Top-notch Base Class) correspond to A- disciplines, and Electronic Information (including Automation) corresponds to Control Science and Engineering A- discipline, with advantageous disciplines strongly attracting applications to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to be highly recommended; Mathematics/Statistics and Energy and Power are recommended; Finance/Economics and Law show a trend of divergence and wait-and-see; Biology, Chemistry, Environment, and Materials are still somewhat discouraged but have improved compared to previous years; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Shanghai college entrance examination is about 66,700 (49,276 in 2025), an increase of about 35%, and the significant growth in candidate numbers will markedly intensify admission competition across universities; East China University of Science and Technology is located in Shanghai, a local university with a large enrollment scale in Shanghai (over 500 students), and local candidates have a high recognition of the university; the university's home province is Shanghai, with a high proportion of local enrollment, and regional preference helps maintain application enthusiasm.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend in historical rankings (3510 positions over the past 5 years), the significant increase of about 35% in the number of Shanghai candidates in 2026 (from 49,276 to about 66,700) leading to markedly intensified competition, the slight reduction in enrollment plan by 1.57% providing some alleviation, and positive factors such as the steady rise in Soft Science rankings (42nd) and relatively hot Douyin popularity, with the surge in candidate numbers being the dominant factor, the predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is about 11,137, a slight backward shift of about 96 positions compared to 2025; the range is 10,637–11,637.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is about 11,137, with a range of 10,637–11,637. Candidates with rankings above the upper limit (11,637) are advised to mainly use Tier 3 majors as safety options; candidates within the range (10,637–11,637) are advised to focus on Tier 2 majors, with Tier 3 as safety and Tier 1 as reach; candidates with rankings significantly better than the lower limit (within 10,637) can focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors (Computer Science, Electronic Information, Chemical Engineering Double Degree, etc.). East China University of Science and Technology's Chemical Engineering and Technology is A+, top in the country, and related Engineering Experimental Class (Smart Chemical Engineering), although its social popularity is somewhat divided, has extremely strong disciplinary strength, suitable for high-scoring candidates with a clear interest in chemical engineering.
